name: Beef Burgundy Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole, cook bacon on high heat for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until done. Drain and reserve drippings.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon and set aside.
3. Stir flour, bouillon granules, and basil into the reserved drippings.
4. Add beef, undrained tomatoes, and wine; mix well.
5. Cook covered on high heat for 2 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to medium (50%) and cook covered for 15 minutes, stirring twice.
7. Stir in onions and mushrooms.
8. Continue cooking at medium heat for 12 to 18 minutes or until meat and vegetables are tender, stirring twice.
9. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top and serve.
